title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 16 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 17/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-17_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-16-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Mid age LR1 Tanker values have firmed. Suezmax Densa Whale (158,300 DWT, Mar 2012, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to Thenamaris for 32.00 mil, VV value USD 31.08 mil - SS/DD Due. MR2 Ocean Cosmos (50,300 DWT, Jan 2008, SLS) sold for 10.70 USD mil, VV value USD 10.85 mil - At Auction.
